title: niphobolus boothii
intro: Niphobolus boothii, also known as Indian pennywort or Makandi in Ayurvedic medicine, is a perennial herb native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin diseases, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Niphobolus boothii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its therapeutic properties.
